programme.title: E402 - Pups Save A Teeny Penguin / Pups Save The Cat Show
programme.desc: Everest and Jake try to rescue a little penguin and end up floating out to sea on a homemade bridge. // Katie's kittens are all covered in mud and running amuck! If they're not rounded up, the Cat Show will be ruined.

programme.title: E109 - Astrofools
programme.desc: It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop.

programme.title: E732 - Peppa Goes To Paris
programme.desc: Peppa and family go on an exciting trip to Paris to see the sights and meet Delphine Donkey and her family.

programme.title: E112 - The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: E1303 - Pups Save A Lemon-Loving Duckling
programme.desc: A lemon-loving baby duckling from Yumi's Farm gets mixed up in a delivery to Lizzy's Lemonade Shoppe.

programme.title: E211 - Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: E113 - Crabby Boots / Papi's Picnic Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Shelly, a hermit crab missing her shell, who uses one of Boots' boots. Dora travels across the beach in search of her old shell. // Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients! Dora sets off to deliver them.

programme.title: E104 - Tool Duel
programme.desc: Gabby is the mechanic all the Monster Machines in town count on to fix them up. But when Crusher steals all her tools, Gabby needs Blaze's help to get them back!

programme.title: E1303 - Pups Save A Lemon-Loving Duckling
programme.desc: A lemon-loving baby duckling from Yumi's Farm gets mixed up in a delivery to Lizzy's Lemonade Shoppe.

programme.title: E108 - Tiny Dancer / The Sleepy Sun
programme.desc: Dora shows the twins a music box with a baila folklorico dancer who comes to life! Bailarina's adelita boots run away, so we need to get them back. // The sun won't set because it can't fall asleep! Dora needs to find Pillow Cloud so Sol can set.

programme.title: E222 - Roboxman
programme.desc: The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E107 - Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E108 - Double Booked
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once.

programme.desc: When a little bunny gets trapped on top of a melting glacier, Blaze must put his new robot powers to the test as he races to the rescue.

programme.desc: Francois causes musical mayhem, as a one-man band, when he plans a special song for Wally's birthday.

programme.title: E131 - Ballet Lesson
programme.desc: Peppa goes to her first ballet lesson, and meets her friends there. She decides to teach Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig to dance but finds out they have some moves of their own.

programme.title: E6 - Goodbye Campers
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E2 - Better Together
programme.desc: The wilds of Zambia are a tough place to live. Here, many animals must come together in groups to help defend territory, protect offspring, find food and overcome predators.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E6 - Goodbye Campers
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E2 - Better Together
programme.desc: The wilds of Zambia are a tough place to live. Here, many animals must come together in groups to help defend territory, protect offspring, find food and overcome predators.

programme.title: How the Wild Things Sleep
programme.desc: Tap into one of the least understood areas of animal science: sleep. Check out adaptations made by the most extreme snoozers on Earth, from tiny bees who doze for 20 hours a day to enormous elephants who survive on just two precious hours of rest.

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E2 - Escape to the Deep
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: E9 - Nagaina: Queen of Kings
programme.desc: In the hot forest of Southern India, a female King Cobra is on a mission: to find a mate, find food, and lay eggs before the monsoon arrives.

programme.title: E130 - Mehndi Wala Ghar
programme.desc: This is a story of the coming together of a disintegrated joint family in Ujjain that once lived by their motto, 'A family that eats together, prays together, stays together!'

programme.title: E147 - Gatha Shiv Parivar Ki - Ganesh Kartikeya
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar - Lord Ganesh & Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: E4667 - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The lively and diverse residents of Gokuldham Housing Society live together as one big family. They navigate everyday challenges, celebrate festivals and find joy in each other's company.

programme.title: E189 - Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: An Indian adaptation of the acclaimed international series 'Shameless'. The plot centers around Anvita, the eldest sister, who looks after her five siblings as her father struggles with alcoholism.

programme.title: E1189 - Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa Patel, a small entrepreneur and an endearing mother of three faces life's challenges with resilience and courage. Her constant pursuit of living a good life serves as an inspiration to many.

programme.title: E12 - Spice Up- Cooking Show
programme.desc: Whether it's friends over for dinner or the traditional motherly food. Each episode Poonam will make the tastiest dishes for every scenario.

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E3 - Races, Games & Helping Friends!
programme.desc: Join the crew for some fun competitions & a day of helping friends! First, the friends compete in a fun obstacle course to see who can finish the race the fastest & lift the special trophy! Then, just as the crew is ready to demolish an old building, a cute cat hops inside, & the team must rescue the kitten before finishing the job. The helping continues as they save another kitten from a dangerous situation & Dazey must think fast to save Mrs. Skip from a runaway river barge!

programme.title: E2 - Construction Chaos & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: Get ready for some construction chaos & clever fixes! First, Mr. Rubble is very tired & puts the plans on the board upside down, causing the crew to build a house upside down! Then, while building a roundabout, the crew finds some big old dinosaur bones! The chaos continues as a power cut stops all their machines, so they hook everything up to clean solar panels instead. From building a pond for frogs to building themselves into a box, it's always chaotic!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E2 - Awesome Baby Truck Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby Truck for some awesome adventures at Gecko's Garage! The fun begins with a play date where Baby Truck & the Mechs take an imaginary trip to outer space, modifying Baby Truck into a rocket to explore the galaxy! Then, after getting a boo boo in the play park, the Mechanicals try to make her laugh but she can't stop giggling! The adventure ends when Mummy Truck is exhausted & Gecko gives her a spa day while Baby Truck has a fun art class with Grandma.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Family Are His Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John thinks his family members are the best heroes! He really loves & admires his dad, & wants to copy everything he does to be just like him. His big brother Jack is a hero, too, & is always willing to help his little brother & teach him new things. After Mom's cupcakes go missing, Baby John dresses up as a police officer to find out who took them, interviewing each of his family member heroes!

programme.title: E2 - When Cute Creatures Cause Big Chaos!
programme.desc: Watch out, because these cute creatures are causing big chaos! First, Chroma the Magic Pet has a cold, & every time she sneezes, she causes a huge color splat! Mila & Morphle must find her before the whole city is covered in color. Then, the Baby Morphles arrive from another dimension & they are in the mood for a game of chase! From a giant living doll to a runaway magic pet, these cute creatures are causing chaos everywhere!

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E2 - Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Jill for some super creative adventures! It's time for the Princess Ball, & Jill decides to decorate her dress. Baby John accidentally spills paint on it, but Jill discovers that an accident can actually help creativity! Then, she decorates her shoes with sparkly stickers to make them the shiniest ever! The creative fun continues as Jill's dressed up as a pink firefighter to help her brothers & has to work hard to keep her princess bunny happy!

E1 - The Making Music Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels find Duggee playing the saxophone, they want to have a go too. Several pots, balloons, tins, tubes and some water later and the Squirrels are making music. And boy, are they LOUD!

programme.title: E11 - Harbin Ice City, China
programme.desc: GrimHQ overheats so lands in Harbin Ice City, melting the amazing ice sculptures.

programme.title: E12 - Shop
programme.desc: Stanley covers Jose at the shop and ends up making too much popcorn. So as not to waste it all, Stanley and his friends put on a film night to screen Little Woo's film.

programme.title: E12 - Tickles
programme.desc: Rio tries to find a missing slipper for her sleeping dad. Dad doesn't mind that he only has one, but Rio spots that the sock on his other foot has a hole in it and feels sorry for him.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E28 - The Space Badge
programme.desc: Duggee teaches the squirrels all about the stars, the planets and the Milky Way!

programme.title: E27 - The Spooky Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing dress up when they hear a ghostly sound. What is going on?

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E41 - Bishop Rock Lighthouse, Isles Of Scilly
programme.desc: Glitch plunges the sea into darkness in a night-time adventure near the Isles of Scilly.

programme.title: E19 - Rusty Robot
programme.desc: When Stan Tall starts to develop rust, it's up to Messy to help.

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E13 - Andy And The Chinstrap Penguins
programme.desc: Andy blasts off in his safari sub to Antarctica in search of chinstrap penguin chicks.

programme.title: E40 - The Imagination Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels tell Duggee that they have nothing left to play with, he encourages them to use their imagination.

programme.desc: The hungry Squirrels turn to Duggee when they aren't sure what to eat. Fortunately, he has his cookbook The Clubhouse Kitchen: Tasty Bites for Hungry Squirrels.

programme.title: E11 - Harbin Ice City, China
programme.desc: GrimHQ overheats so lands in Harbin Ice City, melting the amazing ice sculptures.

programme.title: E12 - Shop
programme.desc: Stanley covers Jose at the shop and ends up making too much popcorn. So as not to waste it all, Stanley and his friends put on a film night to screen Little Woo's film.

programme.title: E12 - Tickles
programme.desc: Rio tries to find a missing slipper for her sleeping dad. Dad doesn't mind that he only has one, but Rio spots that the sock on his other foot has a hole in it and feels sorry for him.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E28 - The Space Badge
programme.desc: Duggee teaches the squirrels all about the stars, the planets and the Milky Way!

programme.title: E27 - The Spooky Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing dress up when they hear a ghostly sound. What is going on?

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E41 - Bishop Rock Lighthouse, Isles Of Scilly
programme.desc: Glitch plunges the sea into darkness in a night-time adventure near the Isles of Scilly.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: Huwag Mong Buhayin Ang Bangkay
programme.desc: Robertito falls in love with Helen, but his jealous brother Gabriel manipulates Helen away from him, breaking his heart. When their mother Aurora involves Julie-who secretly loves Robertito-to comfort him, he discovers the deception, flees in anguish, and dies in an accident. Refusing to accept his death, Aurora makes a dark pact with Lucio to bring her son back to life, unleashing dire supernatural consequences.

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 講述現代失意青年王衡意外穿越到西漢，結識了神似前女友的俠女得九，並與性格開朗的王爺劉賀成為摯友；他們試圖憑藉王衡的現代思維與知識，聯手改變劉賀悲劇性的命運，並在過程中共同成長、療愈彼此。

programme.title: E49
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E49
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E7 - 新成員告五人加盟助力
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E49
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.desc: 講述現代失意青年王衡意外穿越到西漢，結識了神似前女友的俠女得九，並與性格開朗的王爺劉賀成為摯友；他們試圖憑藉王衡的現代思維與知識，聯手改變劉賀悲劇性的命運，並在過程中共同成長、療愈彼此。

programme.title: Super Sub Adventure
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts turn their waka into an underwater submarine to have fun with their dolphin friend Opo.

programme.title: Your Heartbeat
programme.desc: The doctors super-size the heart to investigate the piece of body kit that makes it beat. We meet a Brilliant Body para-cyclist who uses brain power to cycle faster. Meanwhile, Connie comes in with a shaky leg, and Marley has a toothpick stuck in his foot!

programme.title: Macro-germs
programme.desc: Eric discovers that washing your hands can prevent the spread of bacteria. He does an experiment to show how easy it is to spread these tiny germs from person to person.

programme.title: Soapy Sailing
programme.desc: Eric makes a model boat using soap as fuel. The boat moves because the soap breaks the surface tension of the water, causing the water molecules to repel each other and push each other backwards into the boat.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Sock
programme.desc: Henry meets Left Sock, and follows clues to locate his best friend, Right Sock!

programme.title: How do plants eat and drink?
programme.desc: How can we prove plants and flowers drink water? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of botany. Have hands-on fun by making a rainbow-coloured flower, and get to know J.C. Bose, an amazing polymath who pioneered studies into the nature of plants.

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: Help Pooch get over the gap by building a nice strong bridge! We're here to support you.

programme.title: Microscopic World
programme.desc: Philippe heads to the University of Texas to break down the microscopic world of sand and understand how microscopic science plays a role in researching fire ants. At the University of Pennsylvania he learns all about soil.

programme.title: Your Heartbeat
programme.desc: The doctors super-size the heart to investigate the piece of body kit that makes it beat. We meet a Brilliant Body para-cyclist who uses brain power to cycle faster. Meanwhile, Connie comes in with a shaky leg, and Marley has a toothpick stuck in his foot!

programme.title: Macro-germs
programme.desc: Eric discovers that washing your hands can prevent the spread of bacteria. He does an experiment to show how easy it is to spread these tiny germs from person to person.

programme.title: Soapy Sailing
programme.desc: Eric makes a model boat using soap as fuel. The boat moves because the soap breaks the surface tension of the water, causing the water molecules to repel each other and push each other backwards into the boat.

programme.title: It's Snow Time!
programme.desc: Figure skaters Josh, Kloe, and Beccy pack their bags and head to Latvia for an important international competition. But it's not all snowball fights and fun. Josh is moving into the senior category and has decided to attempt a new jump.

programme.title: Life-Changing Operation
programme.desc: Just when Jamie thought he'd conquered his fear of goats, he's sent to the Highlands to track down and treat a giant mountain goat that needs its hooves trimmed. And there's a life-changing operation for a border collie, Joke.

programme.title: Spinning Seeds
programme.desc: Eric learns that plants have different ways to make their seeds fly as far away as possible. He makes his own version of the maple seed, which looks like a little paper helicopter.

programme.title: Macro-germs
programme.desc: Eric discovers that washing your hands can prevent the spread of bacteria. He does an experiment to show how easy it is to spread these tiny germs from person to person.

programme.title: Soapy Sailing
programme.desc: Eric makes a model boat using soap as fuel. The boat moves because the soap breaks the surface tension of the water, causing the water molecules to repel each other and push each other backwards into the boat.

programme.title: The Sin Bin
programme.desc: Ice hockey teammates Liam and Rais have the biggest match of the season against their fiercest rivals. Meanwhile, keen skater Kaira is going for her gold award, but little does she know that someone else in the family has also been practicing down at the rink.

programme.title: Kogelberg - Source To Sea
programme.desc: The youngsters set off through difficult terrain before taking on fearsome rapids. Their journey takes them through a plant kingdom filled with thousands of unique plants and animals, including an unusual sea bird that cannot fly. Can you guess what animal it might be?

programme.title: Trip to Indonesia
programme.desc: Zoe makes a gift for her friend Noa, puzzling Milo-she's given Noa gifts before! Zoe says she has many friends named Noa. Alim suggests it's because they're the eldest. To show how names relate to birth order, he takes them to Bali, where many people are named Wayan

programme.title: Super Sub Adventure
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts turn their waka into an underwater submarine to have fun with their dolphin friend Opo.

programme.title: How do plants eat and drink?
programme.desc: How can we prove plants and flowers drink water? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of botany. Have hands-on fun by making a rainbow-coloured flower, and get to know J.C. Bose, an amazing polymath who pioneered studies into the nature of plants.

programme.title: Doki by the Dozen
programme.desc: How can we make a lot of cupcakes fast, and without getting in each other's way? To find out, Doki's team visits a toy factory in Germany where they see how an assembly line can help to make a lot of identical items in a short period.

programme.title: Vik Goes on Holiday
programme.desc: Vik and his parents visit the most technologically-advanced city in the world. Amazed by the playgrounds in the city's high-tech park, he noticed that the city kids spend all their time staring at screens!

programme.title: New Mayor
programme.desc: An election is happening in Hilltown. It's usually an unimportant event since Senior is the only candidate. This year DiktaThor gets on the campaign with empty promises about superpowers for all. It's up to Sprinter to gather the town behind the drowsy Senior.

programme.title: The Fish Pond
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery help the fish that is suffocating in the dirty pond.

programme.title: The Dam
programme.desc: Kit must shut down the hydroelectric plant to save Mr. Battery before he is chopped in the dam's turbine.

programme.title: Trip to Finland
programme.desc: While it's freezing outside, Zoe and Milo are warm inside. Alim arrives with a towel, ready for a bath in the icy puddle! Zoe and Milo are amazed! Alim takes them to Finland, where Aki shows them saunas and ice baths, proving Alim's point about the refreshing ice bath!

programme.title: Tongue Tongs
programme.desc: Tongue-tong is the newest supervillain weapon against Sprinter. Sprinter uses his wit and gives the villains a taste of their own medicine.

programme.title: Ebb's Blowy Day
programme.desc: Ebb is not happy. It's a blowy day, good for Granny's washing. She helps Flo make a kite. The kite escapes and Bird finds it. They chase Granny's flying washing and lose an oar. Towed home by Flo's kite, Ebb cheers up. Ebb's Blowy day is nearly over.

programme.title: The Future is Futile
programme.desc: The four friends reach a dead end and, even worse, are caught by the lurking Bruno Black. Bruno gives our heroes a sobering reality check, but Hulk refuses to give up, even when all hope is lost.

programme.title: The Fish Pond
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery help the fish that is suffocating in the dirty pond.

programme.title: The Dam
programme.desc: Kit must shut down the hydroelectric plant to save Mr. Battery before he is chopped in the dam's turbine.

programme.title: Wizard School
programme.desc: Robbie and Carol are kept back after school, and alone in the classroom, come across a couple of ancient spell books. An epic battle of magic begins.

programme.title: Jesters
programme.desc: Lord Roach is feeling really down! His wife Geraldine goes out of her way to entertain him, bringing in acrobats, musicians, etc. But it's no good. Enter Little Lewis, dressed in his court jester costume and Lord Roach is very happy.

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: Dramatic Landscapes
programme.desc: Phillipe visits Yellowstone National Park and Zion National Park in the United States. Then he travels to a Pacific island to explore some of the tallest sea cliffs in the world. He ends up in Canada.

programme.title: Frieze Dance
programme.desc: In this episode we learn how math patterns are used as a basis for art, architecture, and even dance movements. Eric shows off some fancy footwork to illustrate the patterning and geometry behind the seven frieze patterns.

programme.title: Critical Examination
programme.desc: Robyn and Nyatepe help transfer a sick lion into a mobile high-tech scanner unit for a critical examination. Josh and Molly are checking the competitors in a posh horse trial for signs of injury and illness. And Jamie and Bonte are helping with Leo's leg surgery.

programme.title: Trip to Finland
programme.desc: While it's freezing outside, Zoe and Milo are warm inside. Alim arrives with a towel, ready for a bath in the icy puddle! Zoe and Milo are amazed! Alim takes them to Finland, where Aki shows them saunas and ice baths, proving Alim's point about the refreshing ice bath!

programme.title: E126 - Study Muffin / Homespun
programme.desc: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: E518 - Love Bytes
programme.desc: Things get a little buggy when Schwoz installs a new operating system on the Man Cave Computer designed to detect and eliminate threats all over Swellview.

programme.title: E220 - Yes Man / Friend or Faux
programme.desc: The sisters enlist the 'Master of Convincing' (AKA Lincoln) to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. // Lisa gets her report card and finds she's failed 'social skills'. To bring up her grade, she must make a friend.

programme.title: E122 - Dad's Stache Stash / A Root Galoot
programme.desc: Cecil shows Patrick his mustache collection. // The Star family brings a mandrake root into their home.

programme.title: E804 - InTODDnito / Weather Or Not
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party. // Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E113 - From Dust Till Dawn
programme.desc: Chloe is struggling with her leadership skills, but when a villain attacks her school field trip, Max and Phoebe have to put Chloe in charge while they try to take down the villain and defuse his dangerous astronomical weapon.

programme.title: E213 - Opposite Universe
programme.desc: Henry and Charlotte are transported into an opposite universe where Ray and Schwoz are evil and want to destroy Piper. They must stop Evil Ray and Evil Schwoz and figure out how to get back to their universe.

programme.title: E209 - The Itching Scratch
programme.desc: Leo suits up as the Night Ninja one last time to take on the villainous cat named Scratch and his mutant Vampire Fleas. It's a grudge-match fifteen years in the making! But what does it all have to do with Splinter? The final battle begins!

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E117 - Donut Disturb / The Cursed Amulet
programme.desc: Bester unwittingly uncovers the not so delicious goings on in Fritz Fritter's top secret Donut Wonderland Factory. // Best and Bester dig up Captain Ironfoot's Cursed Amulet on the beach only to find that Deep Sea Belle wants it too.

programme.title: E118 - That's So Cupid / Buddy Odour
programme.desc: Inspired by the latest Romcom release at the Movie Theatre, Best and Bester decide to go on a match-making mission. // Toot moves into the Sub with Best and Bester, but they find there's no getting away from her smell - literally!

programme.title: E219 - Man Ray Returns / Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation! // Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E224 - Squid Noir
programme.desc: When his clarinet goes missing, Squidward must become a hardboiled detective to track it down.

programme.title: E291 - Swimming Fools
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a pool in his backyard and Squidward tries to resist taking a dip.

programme.title: E122 - Dad's Stache Stash / A Root Galoot
programme.desc: Cecil shows Patrick his mustache collection. // The Star family brings a mandrake root into their home.

programme.title: E209 - She's All Splat
programme.desc: With Cherry working at Splat by Sea, Max ropes her into a fake dating scheme to score partner discounts at the restaurant. Chloe faces a tough choice between winning a trivia competition or supporting her brother Billy when he wants to join her team.

programme.title: E519 - Double-O Danger
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain Man attempt to capture Mob Boss Rob Moss by infiltrating his daughter's the sweet sixteen birthday party.

programme.title: E123 - The Starry Awards / Biorpsgiving
programme.desc: Patrick hosts an award ceremony. // Captain Doug Quasar meets Pat-Tron's robot family.

programme.title: E105 - Meats of Strength / Dead Ed's
programme.desc: Jack's new friend Beef invites him to a sleepover. Jack, a sleepover newb, freaks out over impressing his new friend. // Jack & Lil try to prove they're the one true local, enduring a series of bizarre quests in the local dive restaurant Dead Ed's.

programme.title: E219 - Man Ray Returns / Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation! // Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: Honest tech visionary Shivaay loses faith in technology after being scammed. When he falls for digital influencer Aadhya, their opposing worlds collide, testing love, trust, and beliefs.

programme.title: E58
programme.desc: Mahadev is a man of principles, leading a strict household as the family head! But bound to fly high, his children rebel, and a generational clash ensues!

programme.title: E129
programme.desc: Another portrayal of the same heartfelt love journey, highlighting charm, humor, and the small emotional conflicts that slowly build into meaningful relationships.

programme.desc: Noyontara talks to ghosts and is mocked for it. Her world flips after marrying Surjo, a man who trusts only science, leading to spooky twists and emotional surprises.

programme.title: Blind Youth In Delhi Use Acroyoga To Overcome Exclusion
programme.desc: In Delhi, visually impaired youth deal with exclusion and fear in a chaotic city. But through acroyoga, they build trust and confidence, defying disability and societal neglect. Yoga helps them connect with their bodies and reclaim visibility in a world that often overlooks them.

programme.title: Why Valencia Should Be Your Next Spanish Escape
programme.desc: Join us in Valencia, Spain! DW's Sarah Hucal takes you through her favorite city. She dives into historic plazas, vibrant street art, lively markets and the stunning City of Arts and Sciences. Discover why this might be Spain's most underrated big city - and taste local favorites from creamy horchata to iconic paella.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Tiger And Her Wings' Spin-Off
programme.desc: Hidden in a corner of Ueno stands the Yamada‑Todoroki Law Office, founded by Yamada Yone and Todoroki Taichi. Behind its establishment lies an untold story. This special program revisits The Tiger and Her Wings from the viewpoint of Yone and Todoroki, richly weaving in untold episodes from their past that were never shown in the original morning drama.

programme.title: Natsui Itsuki's Haiku Trip! 'Fukushima'
programme.desc: Haiku poet Natsui Itsuki sets “Haiku Post” across Japan, and receives “your piece of Haiku”! She selects unique works from among them, and invites the authors of those haiku to share their intentions, memories, and life stories. ROLAND, the King of the Hosts, accompanies her as a partner on the trip.

Kenya vs Uruguay - Uruguay Day 2, Men
E4 - From The Three Lakes Region To Geneva, Via Lavaux
programme.desc: The Jura Foot railway line is one of the most beautiful in Switzerland. Lake Biel, Lake Neuchatel and on further south, the train wends its way to the wine-producing region of Lavaux. The journey then continues along the shores of Lake Geneva before ending in Geneva itself.

programme.title: E11 - Finding Your Own Path
programme.desc: Off to the Yukon to experience maximum self-sufficiency in backcountry skiing. This adventure teaches them how important the community is for safely exploring wild terrain.

programme.title: E68
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E4 - From The Three Lakes Region To Geneva, Via Lavaux

programme.title: E11 - Mathias Bensimon/Haider Ackermann/Salome Cousseau
programme.desc: Off to Montreal to discover the Musee des Beaux-Arts. Guided by meditation, Mathias Bensimon creates profound and luminous canvases. Haider Ackermann expresses the sensuality and eroticism so dear to Tom Ford, while adding a touch of poetry and gentleness. Sculptor Salome Cousseau shapes wood with passion and elegance.

programme.title: E9 - Shopping When You Are Visually Impaired?
programme.desc: Visually impaired individuals often encounter difficulties shopping, even online. Websites and stores are far too often poorly adapted to their condition. Also covered: antibiotics and farm animals; orange juice; ravioli for dessert.

programme.title: E68

programme.title: E7 - En Vadrouille Does Its Cabaret
programme.desc: In Villerest, Bijou opens the doors of his cabaret to Loic Ballet. Meryl and Victoria present him the art of wig creation, and Pascal introduces him to rare fruits.

programme.title: E68

programme.title: E6 - History Of The Jeweller Fred, A Magical Exhibition
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: E11 - The Cezallier, A Land Of Silence
programme.desc: In Auvergne, between the Sancy mountains and those of Cantal, lie the high plateaus of Cezallier: a world of solitude, silent, with mystical accents.

programme.title: E2 - Punch Drunk Glove
programme.desc: When Charlie's estranged brother is accused of the death of his recent boxing opponent, Charlie and the team wrestle with the possibility of his guilt.

programme.title: E4 - Ick, A Bod
programme.desc: Elsbeth must separate trick from treat in Sleepy Hollow when a rivalry reaches a ghoulish climax on Halloween night after a suburban housewife butts heads with a new neighbor. Captain Wagner makes a frightening discovery about his daughter.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.desc: This episode of Showdown of the Unbeatables features Acoustiblok noise reduction material versus The Nathan Air Chime; PVAC personal vacuum assisted climber versus world champion rock climber Tori Allen, and the Broco Torch versus ICS Hydraulic Chainsaw.

programme.title: E5 - Second Chances
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWTNewly minted copilot Jeff Tapper is excited for his first revenue DC-3, but his inexperience shows when he botches the approach and bounces the landing three times, nearly running off the runway. Meanwhile, for new rampie Prefkar Mony to realize his dream of becoming a DC-3 pilot, he needs to first pass the written IATRA test. He’s been studying for months, but on his first attempt, he fails. With the help of pilot/mechanic Chris Staples, Prefkar retakes the test and passes, but his victory celebration is short-lived when he’s blamed for leaving an expensive shipment of medicine marked “Do Not Freeze” in a courier van during a minus 30 weekend. Later, Mikey and Katie decide to find Joe a new dog and choose Muffy, a three-year-old dog from the SPCA who is ready to leave her pups. They bring her back to the hangar for a test drive. Joe brings DC-3 CUE out of retirement to test fly the plane for Buffalo’s summer sked duty and he brings along Jeff—and Muffy—to see if they’re

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: While tiger populations all around the world are crashing, tiger numbers in a remote nature reserve in Sumatra, Indonesia are increasing. Here even man killers are being rehabilitated and released into the wild. The man behind this unique conservation project is Indonesian tycoon, Tomy Winata. Tomy’s ambitious plan now includes releasing a tiger born in captivity into the wild, will it survive and can the experiment transform conservation practices and save the Sumatran tiger?

programme.title: E2 - You Play With Fire, You Might Get Burned
programme.desc: Tensions mount in Cayuga as a frightening crash occurs on the drag strip moments before Chris is set to perform his incredibly dangerous first night race of the season alongside his still untested Crew Chief, Wayner.

programme.title: Knockabout
programme.desc: Little John and brother Big John make a living out of crooked exploits and swindling. Their tricks turn sour and they find themselves stripped of cash with nowhere to turn. Desperate for protection, they scurry under the wings of mysterious master, only to pay a heavy price when they discover their master is a con man with a violent past...

programme.title: Crazy Companies 2
programme.desc: Kwai's brother owed the Fok's family two million and Fok's manager Robert persuaded to merge Fu's company. The three pals joined Fok's to solve the crisis...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Lawrence Cheng
programme.desc: Lawrence Cheng has been working in the film industry over 40 years who was known with his friends in the 1980s as the creator of The Yuppie Fantasia franchise. In this episode, Cheng shares his motive of creation and key to success of such franchise, as well as how he got obsessed with film as teen. Looking back, he admits that he was not a very competent director and reveals more unforgettable stories of the past.

programme.title: Knockabout
programme.desc: Little John and brother Big John make a living out of crooked exploits and swindling. Their tricks turn sour and they find themselves stripped of cash with nowhere to turn. Desperate for protection, they scurry under the wings of mysterious master, only to pay a heavy price when they discover their master is a con man with a violent past...

programme.title: The Wesley's Mysterious File
programme.desc: Wesley is a member of the United Nation Aliens Analyzing Agency, and no stranger to extraterrestrial sightings. This time he finds himself face to face with Fong, a blue-blooded alien stranded on earth. Wesley and his girlfriend So promise to help Fong, but they must first combat FBI's powerful X Unit, who intends to capture Fong for their experiments. Making matters worse is the arrival of two aliens from Fong's home planet, determined to kill anyone that prevents them from retrieving their own species...

programme.title: Why, Why, Tell Me Why
programme.desc: The first thing on notices about Yau is his strong hatred for mahjong. He had good reasons: his mahjong-playing mother refused to leave the gaming table to attend to his father who had been robbed. The father died as the result, of course. Being young and fancy-free, Yau goes to the beach with two friends to see if romance should drop on him. It does, and like a ton of bricks because he sees and falls for the beautiful Fong. It so happen Fong is a devoted mahjong player, but she has a sister who hates mahjong, Yau goes all out. He is first snubbed but later comforted by Fong in a gymnasium where he helps her dodge arresting traffic policemen. Fong tries her best to cover her addiction to mahjong and awkward situations come on fast and furious...

programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: E7 - Hardboiled

programme.title: E5 - Curry In A Hurry
programme.desc: The 14 remaining chefs are tasked with preparing a curry dish that promises to pack a punch with only 30 minutes on the clock; the winning dish gives the entire team immunity and claims the top-level kitchen for the next challenge.

programme.desc: The 13 remaining chefs channel their vacation vibes when they're tasked with preparing a seafood dish inspired by tropical island cuisine; the winning dish gives the entire team immunity and claims the top-level kitchen for the next challenge.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: E32
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: Turning Point
programme.desc: Brother Laughing is supposedly an undercover police officer who has infiltrated a triad organization. During a drug-trafficking operation he is caused by Superintendent Poon. Before he became a police officer, Brother Laughing was a member of the triads and worked for the big boss man No. 1. No. 1 was very good to Laughing, and Laughing looked up to No. 1 as his elder brother. In order to strengthen his business and illegal activities, No. 1 arranges for Laughing to join the Police Force and become his mole to gather information about the plans and counter-plans for operations by the police. Laughing graduated from Police Academy with outstanding results but before he was assigned to a post as a police officer, his “bad boy” image attracted the attention of the Head of District Anti-Triad Squad, Superintendent Sin who arranges his assignment as an undercover cop to infiltrate the mob syndicate. Laughing was now a “double” mole. No. 1 was happy with this turn of events as Laug

programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Ye Hai Mohabbatein
programme.desc: A Tamil dentist and Punjabi businessman fall in love, navigating family expectations, parenting, and emotional complexities across cultures.

programme.title: Arnold Palmer Invitational presented by Mastercard
E42 - Crossing Lutetia
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place:2025-2026
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E7 - When Two Hearts Meet
programme.desc: Florence realises that Leon fancies her and she helps him to go through Francis's archives in search of information about Marianne. Leon discovers that his mother had been hiding an enormous secret.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: Un Apres-Midi A Se Fesser Dessus
programme.desc: The Bouchard-Beauregards are in the final stages of preparing for their move. Sophie, a devoted wife and mother, struggles to manage the chaos around her.

programme.title: E21 - The Black Dahlia
programme.desc: It's one of the most infamous crimes in American history: the gruesome murder of a young beauty, unsolved for decades. There's a long line of suspects, each more mysterious than the next.

programme.title: E22 - Twa Flight 800
programme.desc: In July 1996, one of the worst aviation disasters in American history leaves 230 people dead and countless questions unanswered. It's a tragedy that changes the aviation industry forever.

programme.title: E10 - Strange Weapons
programme.desc: While wars may be won by men, they're fought with weapons. Teetering between the apocalyptic and absurd, declassified records will unveil the secret weapons programs that attempted to bring down the world.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？
